creator: eric+fbports@vangyzen.net
text:
That patch is close, but it misses some changes to the pkg-plist.
Use this one.

Eric


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /freebsd/cvsroot/ports/math/R/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.51
diff -u -r1.51 Makefile
--- Makefile	21 May 2006 19:01:54 -0000	1.51
+++ Makefile	31 Aug 2006 23:32:09 -0000
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	R
-PORTVERSION=	2.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.1
 CATEGORIES=	math lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cran.r-project.org/src/base/R-2/ \
 		ftp://cran.r-project.org/pub/R/src/base/R-2/ \
